class.name: perceptive_legged_control/PerceptiveLeggedController
class.description: Legged controller variant that feeds convex planar terrain height into the OCS2 swing trajectory planner.

class.name: perceptive_legged_control/PerceptiveLeggedCheaterController
class.description: Perceptive legged controller for simulation that uses /ground_truth/state instead of the Kalman filter.
